title: Campaign pressure summary

pressure_accounting.reason: Largest stimulated footprint (3014 DE at Stim8hr) with on-target KD at its strongest condition and K562-inert cell-type-specific verdict.

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown plus matched Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr targeted RNA-seq before assay-design promotion
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps RCC1L at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps MCAT at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps RWDD2B at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps CCDC22 at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes
On-target 457-DE footprint at its strongest Stim48hr condition with low Rest DE (20), though Stim8hr shows no on-target KD, so gate on capacity.
Clean on-target 407-DE Stim8hr footprint with low Rest DE (19) but a smaller, less distinctive footprint suited to backup ranking.
Smallest stimulated footprint (389 DE) among the eight, on-target and cell-type-specific but lowest-magnitude, best held as a ranked backup.

boundary_statement: Claude pressure became review work: aligned rows stayed aligned, more-aggressive rows became assay gates, gate probes added controls or lowered priority, and no accepted state changed.
